title: Merge Sorted Overlapping Intervals - 2
hints: Since the intervals are already sorted by start value, you can process them in order.
Maintain a current interval [cur_st, cur_end] that you're building.
For each new interval, check if it overlaps with the current interval.
Two intervals overlap if the start of the new interval is <= the end of the current interval.
If they overlap, merge them by updating cur_end to max(cur_end, new_end).
If they don't overlap, add the current interval to the result and start a new current interval.
Don't forget to add the last interval to the result after processing all intervals.
